content.en:
"Limit!"

Ye Tian had a feeling that the Nine Tribulation Realm of the Flesh Body should be the limit, and there was no so-called Ten Tribulation Realm at all.

Moreover, no matter how much he used the robbery stone to refine the flesh body, he couldn't make the slightest progress, and at the level of the flesh body robbery realm, he had already reached the extreme.

At this time, he had to go to the foreign world, influence the physical body through the rules of the foreign world, fight against the rules of the foreign world again and again, make the physical body complete the qualitative change, and then use a large number of origin rules to rob the crystal, so as to step into the realm of the invincible.

Of course, the rules of touching the exotic world with the physical body, especially during the non-Great Tribulation, will turn into ashes if you are not careful, and even many treasures may not be effective.

Besides, Ye Tian didn't have any life-saving treasures on his body.

As for exchanging some treasures from other super-famous forces, it is also unrealistic.

"At the beginning, use the copy body to compete with the rules of the Exotic World, try it, even if you fail, you will only lose a copy body!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

---------------

This time, Ye Tian chose to enter the Xiyue Clan Heaven and Earth, and he built a second-order gate between the Xiyue Clan's Heaven and Earth and the Dark Forbidden Domain, so he didn't need to pay any price to enter the Xiyue Clan's Heaven and Earth with his current realm.

Wow!

Ye Tian shuttled through this second-order gate and came to the base of the Xiyue Clan's Heaven and Earth.

Inside the base, Ye Tian looked at the world of the Xiyue Clan in the outside world, sensing the rules of the outside world.

At this time, the world of the Xiyue clan is not during the great tribulation, once you enter the world of the sunset moon clan, you will inevitably bear the impact of the rules, and the general supreme power, even the strongest person of the third level, will turn into ashes in an instant, and there is no chance of being spared.

Ye Tian was the strongest person in the Nine Tribulations Realm of the Flesh at this time, but whether he could withstand the rules of the Xiyue Clan's heaven and earth, he didn't know yet.

At this time.

Some of the ancestors of the human race were also here, and they looked at Ye Tian one by one, waiting for Ye Tian to enter the world of the Xiyue Clan.

They also knew that Ye Tian was going to try to enter the Invincible Realm, so they all wanted to take a look, maybe in the distant future, they would also have the opportunity to impact the Invincible Realm!

Ye Tian didn't have any worries, after all, this was just a copy of the body, and there was no worry about his life, so he naturally didn't worry about it at all.

Rumble!!!

Ye Tiancai's base crossed into the world of the Xiyue Clan in one step.

Suddenly, the rules of the Xiyue Clan's heaven and earth sensed Ye Tian, an exotic intruder, and the endless rules crushed down.

Click!!!

Ye Tian's flesh was cracked, with his flesh body, the body of the Nine Tribulations Realm supreme powerhouse, he couldn't bear the rules of the exotic world, and in an instant, his flesh was cracked, and endless blood flowed out, and the blood was annihilated again.

Ye Tian used all his strength to defend against the strongest ancestral skills, but they were shattered, and these extreme ancestral skills could not protect him at all, because this was a fundamental test of the rules for the physical body, and it was not blocked by the supreme ancestral skills.

Soon, Ye Tian's physical body could not withstand the suppression of the rules, and he returned to the base in time, so this replica body was not completely annihilated, but it was also on the verge of death.

base.

Ye Tian's copy body sat there, sensing the situation in his body, so as to comprehend the harvest of this confrontation with the rules of heaven and earth of the Xiyue Clan.

Soon, he had something to gain.

For example, there are some places in the physical body that were directly turned into ashes when they confronted the rules of heaven and earth of the Xiyue Clan, obviously those places could not evolve and needed to be abandoned, while some places had undergone slight changes and became stronger, so these places needed to be tempered.

Subsequently, Ye Tian entered the Xiyue Clan's heaven and earth again, and once again confronted the rules of the Xiyue clan's heaven and earth, but this time the confrontation was very short, and Ye Tian returned to the base.

In the confrontation after confrontation, Ye Tian understood more about the mystery of the physical body.

But in the end, the replica body collapsed and could not be recovered at all.

Soon after, Ye Tian paid some resources to condense a replica body, enter the world of the Xiyue clan again, and comprehend the mystery of the physical body by confronting the world of the Xiyue clan again and again.

An Era of Realms!

Ten Realms Era!

Hundred Realms Era!

......

Ye Tian didn't know how many times he had condensed his copy body, but many of the resources of the Dark Forbidden Domain and many of the resources collected by other exotic worlds were almost exhausted by him.

However, he succeeded in the end.

Through countless condensation and replication of the body, with countless times against the rules of the exotic world, comprehending the mysteries of the physical body, and successfully sorting out a set of evolutionary routes suitable for oneself, the physical body can perfectly undergo qualitative changes under the influence of the exotic rules without being harmed.

this day.

Under the influence of the rules of heaven and earth of the Xiyue Clan, and under the control of Ye Tian, the physical body is constantly changing, and some places are directly abandoned and replaced by a new physical body.

Moreover, countless resources were consumed, prompting Ye Tian's physical body to become stronger and stronger.

Eventually, the physical nature changed.

Bang!!!!

Countless Xiyue Clan's heaven and earth rules were integrated into Ye Tian's physical body, helping this physical body complete the final qualitative change.

It was at this time that Ye Tian took out a large amount of Origin Rule Robbery Crystals.

Ten pieces!

100 pieces!

Thousand!

In the end, Ye Tian consumed more than 3,000 Origin Rule Tribulation Crystals, which allowed him to completely break through.

At the moment of breakthrough, Ye Tian's physical body completely transformed into an invincible body, and his cultivation stepped into the realm of invincible ancestors.

Of course, this is Ye Tian's copy body breakthrough, not the ontological breakthrough.

With the breakthrough of this replica body, Ye Tian found that he could permanently solidify this body and become a new clone, but the clone in the forbidden land of the sea and sky had to be disbanded.

For Ye Tian, the Heyuan Holy Beast clone in the Haitian Forbidden Land was too weak, and it couldn't help him much at all, so it was better to disband it directly.

As a result, Ye Tian disbanded the Heyuan Holy Beast clone and solidified the replica body into a permanent clone.

In this way, Ye Tian could allow this invincible ancestor clone to try to go to the Eternal Heaven and Earth, while the main body could sit in the Dark Forbidden Land and ensure that the Dark Forbidden Land was fine.

After the breakthrough of the copy body, Ye Tian let the body try.

Soon after, the ontology also completely stepped into the realm of the invincible ancestor.

In this way, Ye Tiancai can be regarded as a real invincible ancestor, his strength far surpasses that of ordinary invincible ancestors, even the leader of the boundless wall is not his opponent, and his strength is infinitely close to that of a fifth-class invincible.
